headline_seed: FBI foiled alleged plot to attack White House UFC event, Kash Patel says - NBC News
draft_text:
#BreakingMews FBI foiled an alleged drone-and-gunman plot targeting the UFC event on the White House South Lawn, arresting suspects across four federal districts, CNN reports. FBI Director Kash Patel confirmed the arrests. No charges unsealed yet.

And that's the mews.
